substrate: direct docker run per (arm x rep), rails-emulated identically for both images (--read-only, --tmpfs /tmp, --tmpfs /home/runner:uid=1000,gid=1000, --user 1000:1000, --cap-drop ALL); source-built images (never ghcr :latest)

C.note: exact claude-sonnet-5 available on OpenRouter -> no model substitution. CONFOUND: Arm A reaches Anthropic directly (OAuth) while Arm C reaches it via OpenRouter, so A<->C changes the provider/routing path alongside the harness -- it is NOT a clean harness-only isolation. Tool-availability deltas (bundle MCP) remain harness-attributable because provider routing does not add/remove bundle tools.

prices.note: list-price-equivalent USD = in_tokens*input + out_tokens*output. Arm A runs on an OAuth subscription (no marginal USD); its USD column is the OpenRouter-listed anthropic/claude-sonnet-5 rate used as the Anthropic-list proxy for comparability only.

normalization.usd: list-price-equivalent from captured tokens (not billed spend)
normalization.retries: 0-by-construction (the eval path has no retry loop; retry policy lives in the kernel, out of this loop)
